allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: enable map feature + stream map.player position *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'map: on-screen tapped-pixel readout for easy calibration on-device *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'map calib: show live world pos paired with tapped pixel *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'map: calibrate projection to real FNV coords \(Goodsprings/Novac/The Fort\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'frontend: fix map nav focus-trap \(100dvh\), green player marker, weapon tap = direct equip \(no hand picker\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: real weapon/armor condition % + equipped state \(per-stack ExtraHealth/ExtraWorn\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: condition-adjusted value + FNV damage formula \(condition x skill\) to match Pip-Boy *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'inventory: show weapon/apparel weight with decimals \(light items no longer round to 0\) *)
Bash(sed -n '2360,2400p' nvse/nvse/GameForms.h)
Bash(awk 'NR>=2360 && NR<=2400' nvse/nvse/GameForms.h)
Bash(sed -n '546,556p' nvse/nvse/GameExtraData.h)
Bash(awk '/class ExtraHealthPerc/,/};/' nvse/nvse/GameExtraData.h)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: armor DT reads damageThreshold \(FNV\), not armorRating; debug-log equipped weap/armor breakdown *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: fix Pip-Boy value \(base×ratio^1.5\) and weapon DAM \(condition only, no skill term\) *)
Bash(git commit -q -m 'plugin: floor inventory weight to match Pip-Boy \(210 not 211\); re-add one-shot weapon debug log to solve gun skill formula *)

Bash(cd /tmp/JIP-LN-NVSE-Library && grep -rin "0x645380\\|GetWeaponDPS\\|CalculatedWeaponDamage\\|GetWeaponDamage\\|0x6453\\|WeaponDPS\\|645380" . 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "=== search both repos for 0x645 addresses near damage ==="; grep -rin "0x6452\\|0x6453\\|0x6454" /tmp/JIP-LN-NVSE-Library /tmp/JohnnyGuitarNVSE 2>/dev/null | head)
Read(//private/tmp/JIP-LN-NVSE-Library/**)

Bash(cd /tmp && grep -rin "numProjectiles\\|projectileCount\\|nbProjectiles\\|UInt32 numProj" JohnnyGuitarNVSE JIP-LN-NVSE-Library xnvse-probe 2>/dev/null | grep -i "weap\\|proj" | head; echo "=== TESObjectWEAP attackDmg / fields ==="; grep -rn "numProjectiles\\|attackDmg\\|UInt8\\s*numProj\\|projectile" /tmp/xnvse-probe/nvse/nvse/GameForms.h 2>/dev/null | head)
